videos.headline: Oregon scores two long TDs for early lead over Oklahoma State
videos.description: Noah Whittington scores a 59-yard touchdown for the Ducks, which is quickly followed by a 65-yard pass by Dante Moore to Dakorien Moore that gives Oregon the early lead over Oklahoma State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon scores two long TDs for early lead over Oklahoma State) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dakorien Moore scores his 2nd TD for Oregon
videos.description: Dakorien Moore stretches out for a 25-yard TD to give Oregon a 34-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dakorien Moore scores his 2nd TD for Oregon) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon makes a house call for 62-3 lead
videos.description: Jerry Mixon intercepts a pass from Zane Flores and returns it for a 25-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon makes a house call for 62-3 lead) 2025/09/06 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon adds to lead with pick-six
videos.description: Peyton Woodyard returns an interception 30 yards for a touchdown to give Oregon back-to-back pick-sixes.
